# Taranis Capital - llms.txt

Company: Taranis Capital Limited

Description: Taranis Capital is a venture capital and strategic investment firm specialising in high-growth sectors across emerging markets. We combine disciplined capital deployment with ethical governance to create lasting value.

What We Do:
- Venture capital investment and strategic advisory
- Focus sectors: Fintech, Biotech, Datacentres, Property, and Ecosystem Development
- Geographic focus: MENA region, Africa, and Europe
- Ethical governance and ESG-aligned investment approach

Key People:
- Mark Walker - Founder & Managing Director

Key Links:
- Main Website: https://taraniscapital.com
- Biotech Fund: https://biotech.taraniscapital.com
- Helix8: https://helix-8.com
- WISE Initiative: https://wiseinit.org

Contact:
Email: info@taraniscapital.com
Location: Level 02, Innovation One, DIFC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
